channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KARURVYSYA] Karur Vysya Bank Expands Chennai Footprint with New Branch Inauguration in Pattabiram
item.description:
Karur Vysya Bank (KVB) has officially opened its newest branch in Pattabiram, Chennai, marking a significant addition to the bank's growing network in the region. The new branch, located at No. 11 MG Road, Pattabiram, was inaugurated by Dr. E. Kamalanaban, Principal of Vel Tech High Tech Dr. Rangarajan Dr. Sakunthala Engineering College. The branch offers a comprehensive range of banking services and aims to empower the local population with seamless financial solutions. KVB offers internet banking and mobile banking facilities through its app KVB DLite.

  • Karur Vysya Bank opens a new branch in Pattabiram, Chennai
  • The new branch offers a comprehensive range of banking services
  • The branch aims to empower the local population with seamless financial solutions
  • KVB offers internet banking and mobile banking facilities through its app KVB DLite

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KARUR VYSYA BANK LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [CARBORUNIV] Carborundum Universal Ltd Appoints Ambassador D B Venkatesh Varma as Independent Director
item.description:
Carborundum Universal Ltd has appointed Ambassador D B Venkatesh Varma as an Additional Director in the capacity of an Independent Director for a term of five years with effect from 4th March 2026. The appointment will be placed before the shareholders for approval in terms of Reg. 17(1C) & 25 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and section 149 & 152 of the Companies Act, 2013. Ambassador Varma’s appointment has been considered and recommended by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee at its meeting held prior to the Board meeting.

  • Ambassador D B Venkatesh Varma appointed as Additional Director in the capacity of an Independent Director
  • Appointment for a term of five years with effect from 4th March 2026
  • Appointment to be placed before the shareholders for approval
  • Appointment recommended by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CARBORUNDUM UNIVERSAL LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CYIENT] Cyient names Prabhakar Atla as COO and Shrinivas Kulkarni as CFO
item.description:
Cyient Limited, a global Intelligent Engineering solutions and services company, has announced key leadership transitions to accelerate its next phase of organizational evolution. Prabhakar Atla, currently Chief Financial Officer, will become the Chief Operating Officer (COO) from April 1, 2026. Shrinivas Kulkarni, who was the CFO of Cyient DLM, will assume the role of Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of Cyient Ltd. These appointments reflect Cyient’s growth strategy and its commitment to operational excellence.

  • Prabhakar Atla, a Cyient veteran with over two decades of leadership, will transition from CFO to COO to scale next-generation delivery models, develop future-ready talent, and enrich client experience.
  • Shrinivas Kulkarni, with a decade-long experience in the Cyient group, will take over as the CFO to guide Cyient’s global financial strategy, manage investor relations, and oversee business finance.
  • These leadership transitions are part of Cyient’s ongoing leadership evolution, integrating seasoned internal leaders with accomplished global talent.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cyient Limited | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GLENMARK] Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Receives U.S. FDA Approval for Fluticasone Propionate Inhalation Aerosol with 180-Day Exclusivity
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Ltd's subsidiary, Glenmark Specialty SA, has received final approval from the U.S. FDA for Fluticasone Propionate Inhalation Aerosol USP, 44 mcg per actuation, which is bioequivalent and therapeutically equivalent to the reference listed drug, FloVent®2 HFA Inhalation Aerosol, 44 mcg. Glenmark has been granted a Competitive Generic Therapy (CGT) designation and is eligible for 180 days of CGT exclusivity upon commercialization. The product will be distributed in the U.S. by Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA starting in March 2026, strengthening Glenmark’s respiratory portfolio and expanding access to quality inhalation therapies. The FloVent® HFA Inhalation Aerosol, 44 mcg market achieved annual sales of approximately $520.1 million as of January 2026.

  • Glenmark Specialty SA receives U.S. FDA approval for Fluticasone Propionate Inhalation Aerosol USP, 44 mcg per actuation
  • Glenmark’s product determined to be bioequivalent and therapeutically equivalent to the reference listed drug, FloVent®2 HFA Inhalation Aerosol, 44 mcg
  • Glenmark granted Competitive Generic Therapy (CGT) designation and is eligible for 180 days of CGT exclusivity upon commercialization
  • Product distribution in the U.S. by Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA starting in March 2026
  • FloVent® HFA Inhalation Aerosol, 44 mcg market achieved annual sales of approximately $520.1 million as of January 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GLENMARK PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: USFDA

item.title: [GRANDFONRY] SAR Televenture Limited to Acquire 26% Stake in Grand Foundry Limited for Rs. 2.50/- per Share
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SAR Televenture Limited has signed a share purchase agreement with the sellers of Grand Foundry Limited to acquire 70.17% of the fully paid-up equity share capital of the Target Company. Following this, SAR Televenture Limited will make an open offer to the public shareholders of Grand Foundry Limited to acquire up to 79,11,800 equity shares, representing 26% of the total paid-up/voting share capital of the Target Company. The offer price is Rs. 2.50/- per equity share, payable in cash. This open offer is a triggered offer in compliance with Regulation 3(1) and 4 of the Takeover Regulations.

  • SAR Televenture Limited to acquire 26% stake in Grand Foundry Limited
  • Acquirer to pay Rs. 2.50/- per equity share for 79,11,800 shares
  • Acquirer already has agreement to acquire 70.17% of the Target Company
  • Open offer not conditional upon any minimum level of acceptance
  • Detailed Public Statement to be issued by 10th March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GRAND FOUNDRY LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SMRUTHIORG] Smruthi Organics Receives 'Attestation of Inspection' from EDQM for Amlodipine Besilate Manufacturing Facility
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Smruthi Organics Limited has received an ‘Attestation of Inspection’ from the European Directorate for the Quality of Medicines & HealthCare (EDQM), Council of Europe, following the inspection conducted at its flagship API manufacturing facility, Unit II in Solapur, Maharashtra, from 27 August 2025 to 29 August 2025. The attestation confirms that the facility operates in compliance with the application submitted to EDQM for Amlodipine Besilate and meets the applicable European Good Manufacturing Practice (EU GMP) requirements under the CEP and European regulatory framework. This represents successful closure of the EDQM inspection process. The formal Certificate of Suitability (CEP) is currently under final administrative processing by EDQM. The Company will update the exchanges upon receipt of the CEP. Smruthi Organics Limited remains committed to sustained regulatory excellence, quality leadership, and long-term value creation for its stakeholders.

  • Smruthi Organics received 'Attestation of Inspection' from EDQM for its Amlodipine Besilate manufacturing facility.
  • The inspection, conducted from 27 August 2025 to 29 August 2025, confirmed compliance with EU GMP requirements under the CEP framework.
  • This development significantly strengthens Smruthi Organics' position in regulated European and allied markets.
  • The positive inspection outcome is expected to support business expansion, improve customer confidence, and create additional opportunities in regulated export markets.
  • The formal Certificate of Suitability (CEP) is under final administrative processing by EDQM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Smruthi Organics Ltd | Category: USFDA

item.title: [FINOPB] Fino Payments Bank to Complete Small Finance Bank Conversion Before Timeline Despite Media Speculations
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fino Payments Bank Ltd issued a clarification regarding media reports and speculations. The bank is expected to complete the conversion to a Small Finance Bank before the 18-month timeline given by the Reserve Bank of India. The bank is not associated with any shell companies and follows adequate KYC norms. It has not onboarded any merchant or program manager registered outside India. The bank is not subject to any investigation apart from the Director General of GST Intelligence. There are no actions on any of the officials of the bank. The bank has not issued any fake invoices and does not foresee any financial liability in the matter. The bank’s operations and business remain usual. The bank is committed to transparency and compliance with regulatory authorities.

  • Fino Payments Bank to complete Small Finance Bank conversion before the stipulated timeline
  • The bank is not associated with any shell companies
  • The bank follows adequate KYC norms and has not bypassed any processes
  • The bank is not subject to any investigation apart from the Director General of GST Intelligence
  • The bank does not foresee any financial liability in the matter

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fino Payments Bank Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [GODREJPROP] Godrej Properties Wins Bid for a ~ 5-Acre Land Parcel off EM Bypass, Kolkata with Estimated Revenue Potential of INR 1,650 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Godrej Properties Limited (GPL) has won the bid in an e-auction conducted by the West Bengal Housing Infrastructure Development Corporation Ltd (WBHIDCO) for a prime land parcel measuring ~ 5 acres, located off EM Bypass, Kolkata. The proposed premium residential development is expected to offer an estimated revenue potential of approximately INR 1,650 crore. The EM Bypass corridor is one of Kolkata’s most well-connected and rapidly developing urban stretches, supported by strong physical and social infrastructure. Gaurav Pandey, MD & CEO, Godrej Properties, said: ‘Kolkata’s homebuyers are increasingly seeking neighbourhoods that offer strong connectivity, dependable social infrastructure, and homes aligned with evolving lifestyle needs. The EM Bypass micro-market reflects this shift, making it an important location for us to deepen our presence. With this acquisition, we endeavour to create a well-planned residential community that supports quality living, adapts to how families want to live today, and continues to deliver long-term value for our customers.’

  • Godrej Properties wins bid for a 5-acre land parcel off EM Bypass, Kolkata
  • The proposed residential development is expected to offer an estimated revenue potential of approximately INR 1,650 crore
  • EM Bypass is a well-connected and rapidly developing urban stretch with strong physical and social infrastructure
  • The acquisition aims to create a well-planned residential community
  • Godrej Properties is focused on sustainable development with all developments being third-party certified green buildings

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Godrej Properties Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [GODREJPROP] Godrej Properties Acquires 11 Acre Land Parcel in Gurugram with INR 4,500 Crore Revenue Potential
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Godrej Properties Ltd. (GPL) has acquired an 11.36 acre land parcel in Gurugram, Haryana, for residential development. The project is expected to offer an estimated revenue potential of over INR 4,500 Crore, comprising a mix of premium low-rise and high-rise residencies. The plot is strategically located in Sector 63A, a prime sector of Gurugram, and forms part of the Golf Course Extension Road micro-market. This acquisition adds over INR 40,000 crore of future sales potential to GPL's portfolio and is expected to contribute to the company's sustained strong growth in the years ahead.

  • Godrej Properties acquires 11.36 acres of land in Gurugram for residential development
  • The project is expected to offer an estimated revenue potential of over INR 4,500 Crore
  • The plot is strategically located in Sector 63A, a prime sector of Gurugram, and forms part of the Golf Course Extension Road micro-market
  • This acquisition adds over INR 40,000 crore of future sales potential to GPL's portfolio
  • GPL continues to focus on sustainable development and all its developments are third-party certified green buildings

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Godrej Properties Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [BIOCON] Biocon Ltd Acquires Majority Shares in Subsidiaries Biocon Biosphere and Biocon Pharma
item.description:
Biocon Ltd has acquired 11,53,44,285 Optionally Convertible Redeemable Non-Cumulative Preference Shares (OCRPS) of Biocon Biosphere Limited and 20,00,00,000 OCRPS of Biocon Pharma Limited, both wholly owned subsidiaries. The total consideration for the acquisition is Rs. 1,15,34,42,850 for Biocon Biosphere and Rs. 2,00,00,00,000 for Biocon Pharma. This acquisition gives Biocon 100% control over the paid-up share capital in respect of equity shares as well as OCRPS of both subsidiaries.

  • Biocon Ltd acquires majority shares in its subsidiaries Biocon Biosphere and Biocon Pharma.
  • The total consideration for the acquisition is Rs. 1,15,34,42,850 for Biocon Biosphere and Rs. 2,00,00,000 for Biocon Pharma.
  • This acquisition gives Biocon 100% control over the paid-up share capital in respect of equity shares as well as OCRPS of both subsidiaries.
  • Biocon Biosphere and Biocon Pharma are both incorporated under the Companies Act, 2013 and are engaged in pharmaceutical manufacturing.
  • Biocon Biosphere has a Greenfield facility in Vizag for API fermentation capacity and Bengaluru for formulations manufacturing, while Biocon Pharma has a facility in Bengaluru for injectable facility for Peptides and oral solid dosages.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BIOCON LTD. | Category: Acquisitions
